headline: Molson Coors (TAP) – Among the 10 Best Dividend-Paying Beverage Stocks to Buy Now
summary: Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE:TAP) is included among the 10 Best Dividend-Paying Beverage Stocks to Buy Now. Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE:TAP) manufactures, markets, distributes, and sells beer and other malt beverage products. The company also offers a modern portfolio that expands beyond the beer aisle with energy drinks, non-alc beer, and canned cocktails, ready-to-drink […]
